dataset: p1a-e2e-catalog (image->image leave-one-out, grouped by canonical category)
notes: M2 category-clustering promotion record. SigLIP 2 B/16 (hf-hub:timm/ViT-B-16-SigLIP2, 768-dim) beat the incumbent marqo-fashionSigLIP in the same ml/eval/bake_off.py run: mrr 0.8422 vs 0.8078, recall@5 0.3264 vs 0.3212, and recall@10 0.5072 vs 0.5057. Relevance was equality of canonical category labels, so these metrics support category-level image clustering only; they do not establish lift for live text search, personalization, outfit recommendations, or conversion. Clears the current encoder gate (mrr >= 0.50). Bake-off artifacts: eval-reports/bakeoffs/. Same 768 dim as incumbent, so no vector-dimension migration was required.
